channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Test report for address issue, 18th March
item.description:
Vehicle GG99ZZZ

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Baker Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Baby chair left on the street, 18th March
item.description:
This baby chair has been left on the street for several days now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ardleigh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple tent encampments, 18th March
item.description:
In addition to blue tent encampment that’s been spreading significantly and has been there for at least a month, there’s another campground across, near bike cs1 lane w bikes thrown on grass. This park is not a campground to live on. Kids play here. Stench
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wordsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped on the street, 18th March
item.description:
This fridge freezer and this table have been dumped on the street on Ardleigh Road N1 for over a week now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ardleigh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gate blocking path, 18th March
item.description:
Gate is always left open blocking the pavement which causes problems for wheelchair users and mothers with pushchairs. This issue is everyday.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandringham Drive, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing fly tipping at Mehetabel Rd, 18th March
item.description:
Got a notification saying this had been cleared but even more rubbish in the same spot (church well path/Mehetabel Rd) This has been going on for 3 days now

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mehetabel Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge, 18th March
item.description:
Some one has dumped a fridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dove Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box of children’s toys dumped, 18th March
item.description:
Box of children’s toys dumped on Marmadon Road near the junction of Hylton Street. Dumped here overnight thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hylton Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin very full, 18th March
item.description:
Please can someone arrange for the bin on corner of Twyford avenue and Fortis Green opposite spring rift Avenue to be emptied thankyou

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Fortis Green, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At least 7 pothole between churchdown and rangefield on both sides of the road in downham way, 18th March
item.description:
At least 7 pothole between churchdown and rangefield on both sides of the road in downham way some quite severe
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downham Way, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on King Harolds Way in front of junction and before island, 18th March
item.description:
This pothole has been here for at least three months, and has not been addressed. The location of the pothole causes drivers to swerve to avoid it, in front of a junction, and before the crossing island, and near the school. This causes people to be making dangerous manoeuvres, either swerving towards the pavement, or towards the island.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King Harolds Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic refuge has lost pole, light and both reflective arrows, 18th March
item.description:
A bus collided with this refuge at 00:27 this morning, taking out the entire refuge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Station Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned fridge (?) on Lavender Grove, opposite no. 39, 18th March
item.description:
Arrived last night

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by bus stop at the top of Bloomfield Road, 18th March
item.description:
Persistent fly tipping of household waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog Attack, 18th March
item.description:
There was an incident happened recently near the house at the end of Leamington Close. Today dog attacked another dog and person. This is not the first time it happened.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milverton Place, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 18th March
item.description:
Flytipping general rubble

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disrespectful, 18th March
item.description:
This Builder has no regard for the public, so he’s parked on the pavement I’m blocking access for disabled people and people with push chairs

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bounces Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Test Report - Please ignore, 18th March
item.description:
(FAO Anjna) testing missing addresses

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Baker Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass top table and cardboard dumped, 18th March
item.description:
Glass top table on cardboard dumped outside number 206-204 Marmadon Road. Thanks very much.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flight tipped household rubbish, 18th March
item.description:
Household rubbish dumped outside two houses on Marmadon Road number 224 to 222. Litter from these dumps is now strewn all along the pavement. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
